contextVariables.description: The ID of the record currently on the user's screen (Claim when on a claim page).
contextVariables.label: Current Record Id

Bot.description: AI-powered assistant for Electra Cars claim approvers. Summarizes pending claims with AI risk analysis, suggests follow-up questions for dealers, detects fraud patterns, and enables approve/reject decisions from the Agentforce sidebar or Slack.
Bot.label: Electra Claim Approver
